hierarchy.leagueHeader: text-sm font-black uppercase text-orange-500 tracking-wider mb-2 mt-4

components.matchCard: bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-xl border border-zinc-800 p-3 flex flex-col gap-2 relative overflow-hidden transition-colors hover:bg-[#242424]
components.gradientBadge: bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-500 to-red-600 rounded px-2 py-1 flex items-center justify-center text-white font-black shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(249,115,22,0.3)] min-w-[40px]
components.pillFilter: bg-zinc-800 text-white rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide whitespace-nowrap
components.activePillFilter: bg-orange-500 text-white rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide whitespace-nowrap
components.bottomNav: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md mx-auto bg-[#0A0A0A]/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-zinc-800 flex justify-around py-3 px-2 pb-safe z-50
components.fab: fixed bottom-20 right-4 h-12 px-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-500 to-red-600 rounded-full shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/30 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-white font-bold z-40
components.detailOddCard: bg-zinc-800/50 border border-zinc-700 rounded-lg p-3 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1
components.menuDropdown: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden

layouts.appContainer: min-h-screen bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white w-full max-w-md mx-auto relative shadow-2xl flex flex-col font-body
layouts.header: flex items-center justify-between p-4 sticky top-0 bg-[#0A0A0A]/95 backdrop-blur z-30 border-b border-zinc-900
layouts.filterScroll: flex overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar gap-2 px-4 py-3 border-b border-zinc-900 w-full

icons_and_assets.instructions: Use lucide-react. BrainCircuit (AI), Network (Cluster), Calendar (Date), Filter (Filtri), Globe (Europa), Settings/Wrench (Strumenti), BookOpen (Linee Guida), Upload (Carica), Download (Export).

instructions_to_main_agent: Develop a mobile-first UI tailored for a max-w-md container. The design should look like a premium native mobile app running in the browser.
Use deep obsidian black (#0A0A0A) for the main background. Use #1A1A1A for cards with subtle #27272A borders.
Typography: Use a condensed bold font for headers/leagues (e.g., 'text-orange-500 font-black uppercase text-sm tracking-wider') to mimic the reference.
Top Navigation: Title 'ScoreBlast' or 'Menu Analisi' dropdown. Include a date pill, filter pill, and region pill in a horizontally scrollable bar below the header.
Home Screen: Group matches by 'Manifestazione' (League). Iterate over leagues and display the uppercase orange header. Then list the match cards.

Match Card Layout: Display teams vertically on the left. In the center, show the time. On the right, show the 1X2 gradient odds badge. Bottom row for AI and Cluster badges. Support long-press or a checkbox for multi-selection.

Match Detail: When opening a match, show all odds grouped by market family (1X2, Doppia Chance, U/O, GG/NG). Highlight the most probable prediction. Show '(stima)' for calculated odds and an AI reasoning block.
Multi-select & FAB: Show a floating action button with a counter when matches are selected. Tapping it opens a bottom sheet with the list of selected matches.
Strumenti Screen: Create cards for 'Carica Excel', 'Import Backup', 'Export Backup', 'Book Linee Guida', and 'AI Studio Framework'.
Book Screen: Implement an accordion listing betting rules.
Bottom Tab Navigation: Create a bottom nav bar linking to Home, Strumenti, and Book.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to all interactive elements, e.g., 'data-testid="match-card-juve-milan"', 'data-testid="filter-pill-europa"'.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure sufficient contrast, especially for text within the gradient badges.
accessibility.touchTargets: Use generous padding for tap targets (min 44px equivalent).
